MODULE: cosmos.core.quantum_trading
FILE: cosmos/core/quantum_trading.py (1752 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Quantum Trading Cortex — AGI v2.1

A new cortex for the Cosmos organism: quantum-enhanced trading intelligence.
Fuses EMA momentum, quantum simulation, and collective deliberation into
actionable trading signals. Signals feed back into memory and evolution,
making the whole system smarter ove

CLASSES:
- QuantumTradingSignal: A fused quantum trading signal — the organism's trading prediction.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_any(cls, data: dict) -> 'QuantumTradingSignal'
- QuantumCorrelation: Cross-token 'entanglement' — correlated price movements.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- EMAEngine: Maintains per-token EMA state from 1-second price feeds.
Fast EMA (~10 ticks, al
  Methods: def update(self, token_address: str, price: float) -> dict
  Methods: def get_state(self, token_address: str) -> Optional[dict]
  Methods: def clear_token(self, token_address: str)
- TTLCache: Simple time-to-live cache for computed values.
  Methods: def get(self, key: str) -> Optional[dict]
  Methods: def set(self, key: str, value: dict)
  Methods: def invalidate(self, key: Optional[str]=None)
- SignalAccuracyTracker: Tracks quantum signal accuracy over time.
Mirrors fitness_tracker.py patterns: T
  Methods: def record_signal(self, signal: QuantumTradingSignal)
  Methods: def resolve_signal(self, signal_id: str, actual_price_1m: float, actual_price_5m: float) -> Optional
  Methods: def get_accuracy_stats(self) -> dict
  Methods: def get_weight_recommendations(self) -> dict
  Methods: def get_leaderboard(self) -> list
  Methods: def get_recent_signals(self, limit: int=50) -> list[dict]
- QuantumTradingCortex: A new cortex for the Cosmos organism — quantum-enhanced trading intelligence.

  Methods: async def generate_signal(self, token_address: str, price_history: Optional[list[float]]=None, curre
  Methods: async def discover_correlations(self, token_addresses: list[str]) -> list[QuantumCorrelation]
  Methods: async def quantum_scenario_analysis(self, token_address: str, price_history: Optional[list[float]]=N
  Methods: async def evolve_weights(self)
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
- QuantumAlgoOptimizer: Uses IBM Quantum HARDWARE to optimize the DegenTrader's trading algorithm.

This
